task_description: Implement kth_smallest(nums, k): return the k-th smallest element of an integer list using 1-based k (k=1 returns the minimum). Duplicates count: in [1,1,1], the 2nd smallest is 1. If nums is empty, k < 1, or k > len(nums), return None.

bugs_in_buggy.description: Treats k as 0-indexed; for k=1 returns the 2nd smallest, and for k == len(nums) raises IndexError.
k is not validated against bounds; k<1 or k>len(nums) should return None per spec.
bugs_in_buggy.suggested_fix: Add `or k < 1 or k > len(nums)` to the guard.

bugs_in_tricky.description: `set(nums)` deduplicates; spec says duplicates count, so [1,1,1] with k=2 should return 1 but this returns None.
